for secure https URL connections.

info.excerpt:
Gets the SSL socket factory to be used when creating sockets
for secure https URL connections.

javax.net.ssl/X509KeyManager/getServerAl.name: getServerAliases
javax.net.ssl/X509KeyManager/getServerAl.description:
Get the matching aliases for authenticating the server side of a secure
socket given the public key type and the list of
certificate issuer authorities recognized by the peer (if any).

info.excerpt:
Get the matching aliases for authenticating the server side of a secure
socket given the public key type and the list of
certificate issuer authorities recognized by the peer (if any).

javax.net.ssl/HttpsURLConnection/getServ.name: getServerCertificates
javax.net.ssl/HttpsURLConnection/getServ.description:
Returns the server's certificate chain which was established
as part of defining the session.

info.excerpt:
Returns the server's certificate chain which was established
as part of defining the session.

javax.net.ssl/SSLParameters/getServerNam.name: getServerNames
javax.net.ssl/SSLParameters/getServerNam.description:
Returns aListcontaining allSNIServerNames of the
Server Name Indication (SNI) parameter, or null if none has been set.

info.excerpt:
Returns aListcontaining allSNIServerNames of the
Server Name Indication (SNI) parameter, or null if none has been set.

javax.net.ssl/SSLContext/getServerSessio.name: getServerSessionContext
javax.net.ssl/SSLContext/getServerSessio.description:
Returns the server session context, which represents the set of
SSL sessions available for use during the handshake phase of
server-side SSL sockets.

info.excerpt:
Returns the server session context, which represents the set of
SSL sessions available for use during the handshake phase of
server-side SSL sockets.

Returns aServerSocketFactoryobject for
this context.

javax.net.ssl/HandshakeCompletedEvent/ge.name: getSession
javax.net.ssl/HandshakeCompletedEvent/ge.description: Returns the session that triggered this event.

info.excerpt: Returns the session that triggered this event.
Returns theSSLSessionin use in thisSSLEngine.

javax.net.ssl/SSLSessionBindingEvent/get.name: getSession
javax.net.ssl/SSLSessionBindingEvent/get.description:
Returns the SSLSession into which the listener is being bound or
from which the listener is being unbound.

info.excerpt:
Returns the SSLSession into which the listener is being bound or
from which the listener is being unbound.

javax.net.ssl/SSLSessionContext/getSessi.name: getSession
javax.net.ssl/SSLSessionContext/getSessi.description: Returns theSSLSessionbound to the specified session id.

info.excerpt: Returns theSSLSessionbound to the specified session id.

javax.net.ssl/SSLSocket/getSession.name: getSession
javax.net.ssl/SSLSocket/getSession.description: Returns the SSL Session in use by this connection.

info.excerpt: Returns the SSL Session in use by this connection.

javax.net.ssl/SSLSessionContext/getSessi.name: getSessionCacheSize
javax.net.ssl/SSLSessionContext/getSessi.description: Returns the size of the cache used for storingSSLSessionobjects grouped under thisSSLSessionContext.

info.excerpt: Returns the size of the cache used for storingSSLSessionobjects grouped under thisSSLSessionContext.

javax.net.ssl/SSLSession/getSessionConte.name: getSessionContext
javax.net.ssl/SSLSession/getSessionConte.description: Returns the context in which this session is bound.

info.excerpt: Returns the context in which this session is bound.

javax.net.ssl/SSLSessionContext/getSessi.name: getSessionTimeout
javax.net.ssl/SSLSessionContext/getSessi.description:
Returns the timeout limit ofSSLSessionobjects grouped
under thisSSLSessionContext.

info.excerpt:
Returns the timeout limit ofSSLSessionobjects grouped
under thisSSLSessionContext.

javax.net.ssl/SSLParameters/getSignature.name: getSignatureSchemes
javax.net.ssl/SSLParameters/getSignature.description:
Returns a prioritized array of signature scheme names that can be used
over the SSL/TLS/DTLS protocols.

info.excerpt:
Returns a prioritized array of signature scheme names that can be used
over the SSL/TLS/DTLS protocols.

javax.net.ssl/HandshakeCompletedEvent/ge.name: getSocket
javax.net.ssl/HandshakeCompletedEvent/ge.description: Returns the socket which is the source of this event.

info.excerpt: Returns the socket which is the source of this event.

Returns aSocketFactoryobject for this
context.

javax.net.ssl/SSLEngineResult/getStatus.name: getStatus
javax.net.ssl/SSLEngineResult/getStatus.description: Gets the return value of thisSSLEngineoperation.

info.excerpt: Gets the return value of thisSSLEngineoperation.

javax.net.ssl/ExtendedSSLSession/getStat.name: getStatusResponses
javax.net.ssl/ExtendedSSLSession/getStat.description:
Returns aListcontaining DER-encoded OCSP responses
(using the ASN.1 type OCSPResponse defined in RFC 6960) for
the client to verify status of the server's certificate during
handshaking.

info.excerpt:
Returns aListcontaining DER-encoded OCSP responses
(using the ASN.1 type OCSPResponse defined in RFC 6960) for
the client to verify status of the server's certificate during
handshaking.

javax.net.ssl/SSLEngine/getSupportedCiph.name: getSupportedCipherSuites
javax.net.ssl/SSLEngine/getSupportedCiph.description:
Returns the names of the cipher suites which could be enabled for use
on this engine.

info.excerpt:
Returns the names of the cipher suites which could be enabled for use
on this engine.

javax.net.ssl/SSLServerSocket/getSupport.name: getSupportedCipherSuites
javax.net.ssl/SSLServerSocket/getSupport.description:
Returns the names of the cipher suites which could be enabled for use
on an SSL connection.

info.excerpt:
Returns the names of the cipher suites which could be enabled for use
on an SSL connection.

javax.net.ssl/SSLServerSocketFactory/get.name: getSupportedCipherSuites
javax.net.ssl/SSLServerSocketFactory/get.description:

Returns the names of the cipher suites which could be enabled for use

javax.net.ssl/SSLSocket/getSupportedCiph.name: getSupportedCipherSuites
javax.net.ssl/SSLSocket/getSupportedCiph.description:
Returns the names of the cipher suites which could be enabled for use

Returns the names of the cipher suites which could be enabled for use

javax.net.ssl/SSLEngine/getSupportedProt.name: getSupportedProtocols
javax.net.ssl/SSLEngine/getSupportedProt.description:

with thisSSLEngine.

info.excerpt:
Returns the names of the protocols which could be enabled for use

javax.net.ssl/SSLServerSocket/getSupport.description: Returns the names of the protocols which could be enabled for use.

javax.net.ssl/SSLContext/getSupportedSSL.name: getSupportedSSLParameters
javax.net.ssl/SSLContext/getSupportedSSL.description:
Returns a copy of the SSLParameters indicating the supported
settings for this SSL context.

Returns a copy of the SSLParameters indicating the supported

javax.net.ssl/TrustManagerFactory/getTru.name: getTrustManagers
javax.net.ssl/TrustManagerFactory/getTru.description: Returns one trust manager for each type of trust material.

info.excerpt: Returns one trust manager for each type of trust material.

javax.net.ssl/SNIMatcher/getType.name: getType
javax.net.ssl/SNIMatcher/getType.description: Returns the server name type of thisSNIMatcherobject.

info.excerpt: Returns the server name type of thisSNIMatcherobject.

javax.net.ssl/SNIServerName/getType.description: Returns the name type of this server name.

javax.net.ssl/SSLParameters/getUseCipher.description: Returns whether the local cipher suites preference should be honored.

info.excerpt: Returns whether the local cipher suites preference should be honored.

javax.net.ssl/SSLEngine/getUseClientMode.name: getUseClientMode
javax.net.ssl/SSLEngine/getUseClientMode.description:
Returns true if the engine is set to use client mode when
handshaking.

info.excerpt:
Returns true if the engine is set to use client mode when
handshaking.

javax.net.ssl/SSLServerSocket/getUseClie.name: getUseClientMode
javax.net.ssl/SSLServerSocket/getUseClie.description: Returns true if accepted connections will be in SSL client mode.

info.excerpt: Returns true if accepted connections will be in SSL client mode.

javax.net.ssl/SSLSocket/getUseClientMode.name: getUseClientMode
javax.net.ssl/SSLSocket/getUseClientMode.description:
Returns true if the socket is set to use client mode when
handshaking.

Returns true if the socket is set to use client mode when

javax.net.ssl/SSLSession/getValue.name: getValue
javax.net.ssl/SSLSession/getValue.description:
Returns the object bound to the given name in the session's
application layer data.

info.excerpt:
Returns the object bound to the given name in the session's
application layer data.

javax.net.ssl/SSLSession/getValueNames.name: getValueNames
javax.net.ssl/SSLSession/getValueNames.description:

data objects bound into the Session.

info.excerpt:
Returns an array of the names of all the application layer
data objects bound into the Session.

javax.net.ssl/SSLEngine/getWantClientAut.description: Returns true if the engine willrequestclient authentication.

info.excerpt: Returns true if the engine willrequestclient authentication.

javax.net.ssl/SSLParameters/getWantClien.description: Returns whether client authentication should be requested.

info.excerpt: Returns whether client authentication should be requested.

javax.net.ssl/SSLServerSocket/getWantCli.description:
